description: Expected CLI/REST/MCP presence per contracted operation (issue #298, docs/pipeline-unification/surfaces/tool-contract.md Crosswalk table). Drift here means a surface added or removed an operation without updating the other two, OR the fixture needs an intentional update after a real cutover step.

operations.note: tool-contract.md crosswalk documents CLI as 'internal/diagnostic' — absence is intentional, not drift.

KNOWN_DIVERGENCE: tool-contract.md crosswalk lists `action=chat`/`axon chat` but neither the CLI command tree nor AxonRequest/MCP_ACTION_SPECS implement it yet — REST-only surface today. Followup: axon-298 chat-surface-rollout (CLI + MCP parity for /v1/chat).
Presence and naming are consistent across all three surfaces; MCP uses singular `action=watch`, matching the CLI verb and generated schema.

KNOWN_DIVERGENCE: REST exposes typed artifact list, metadata, and content routes (plus /v1/jobs/{id}/artifacts); no CLI `artifacts` command and no MCP `artifacts` action/AxonRequest variant exist yet. Followup: axon-298 artifacts-surface-cli-mcp-parity.

Consistently unimplemented everywhere (no CLI command, no REST route in rest_route_inventory, no MCP action/AxonRequest variant) — tool-contract.md crosswalk row is aspirational, not yet a drift between two already-shipped surfaces.
KNOWN_DIVERGENCE: REST exposes GET /v1/collections; no CLI `collections` command and no MCP `collections` action/AxonRequest variant. Followup: axon-298 collections-surface-cli-mcp-parity.

KNOWN_DIVERGENCE: tool-contract.md crosswalk documents `axon graph <sub>`, and REST + MCP both implement the read-only SourceGraph surface, but there is no `axon graph` CLI subcommand today. Followup: axon-298 graph-cli-surface.

KNOWN_DIVERGENCE: tool-contract.md crosswalk documents `axon providers <sub>`, and REST + MCP both implement it, but there is no `axon providers` CLI subcommand today. Followup: axon-298 providers-cli-surface.

KNOWN_DIVERGENCE: `axon reset` is a real CLI command, but rest_route_inventory has no /v1/reset/* routes and MCP_ACTION_SPECS has no `reset` action, despite tool-contract.md crosswalk documenting `/v1/reset/*`/`Reset*`. Followup: axon-298 reset-rest-mcp-surface.

KNOWN_DIVERGENCE: REST + MCP both implement capabilities discovery, but tool-contract.md's crosswalk table omits a `capabilities` row entirely and there is no `axon capabilities` CLI subcommand. Followup: axon-298 capabilities-crosswalk-row-and-cli.
